_comment: Dataset manifest. VisDrone archive records carry BOTH download and extraction state. Checksums and actual sizes are left null until the archive is on disk -- they are never fabricated. scripts/setup_visdrone.py fills them in after validating and extracting; scripts/verify_refdrone.py fills the image/annotation counts.
_visdrone_access_note: The official VisDrone repository (https://github.com/VisDrone/VisDrone-Dataset) and the RefDrone dataset card both distribute the DET images ONLY via Google Drive and BaiduYun. A plain GET against the Drive endpoint returns Google's 'Virus scan warning' HTML page rather than the ZIP -- for the val archive (0.07 GB) as well as train (1.44 GB). Bypassing that page with a scraped confirm-token was explicitly out of scope, and no unofficial mirror (Kaggle, Voxel51 HF, scraped archive) was substituted. The archives must therefore be fetched by hand; see datasets/visdrone2019_det/README.md. The aiskyeye.com object-detection download sub-pages return HTTP 404, so there is no alternative official host.

datasets.notes: 13,022 image-expression records over 6,407 unique images; 47,557 object instances; 8,910 unique expressions. MDETR/COCO JSON. Counts measured from the file, not quoted from the paper.
1,428 records over 534 unique images; 4,741 object instances; 1,124 unique expressions.
3,432 records over 1,595 unique images; 12,105 object instances; 2,686 unique expressions.

datasets.license: VisDrone terms apply to the pixels (academic / non-commercial research)
datasets.notes: 8,536/8,536 required images resolve. Built as 8,536 relative SYMLINKS into datasets/visdrone2019_det/ -- 0 regular files, so the pixels are stored exactly once (1.9 GB dereferenced). Verified by scripts/verify_refdrone.py: 0 missing, 0 broken links, 0 links escaping the VisDrone tree, 0 duplicated payloads, 0 cross-split leakage.

datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 wrapper; VisDrone terms for the pixels
datasets.notes: 884 MB of base64-encoded TEST images, published by the RefDrone authors. FALLBACK ONLY: it covers the test split (1,595 images) without touching VisDrone, but not train or val. Skipped because the same pixels arrive via VisDrone test-dev and get symlinked, so downloading it would duplicate payload.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research. No LICENSE file upstream.
datasets.notes: Upstream states 1.44 GB, 6,471 images. RefDrone train needs 6,407 of them. REQUIRED. expected_size_bytes and sha256 are null because upstream publishes NO checksum and no reliable byte count -- they will be recorded from the file once it is present, rather than fabricated.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research.
datasets.notes: Upstream states 0.07 GB, 548 images. RefDrone val needs 534 of them. REQUIRED. Note even this small archive hits the Google Drive interstitial, so it cannot be fetched non-interactively either.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research.
datasets.notes: Upstream states 0.28 GB, 1,610 images. RefDrone test needs 1,595 of them. REQUIRED. Ground truth IS available for test-dev (unlike test-challenge).

DO NOT DOWNLOAD. Verified against the RefDrone annotations: all 8,536 referenced images fall in train / val / test-dev. Its ground truth is withheld for the challenge anyway. scripts/verify_refdrone.py warns if this directory is ever populated.

datasets.component: EO sample imagery / drone video for smoke tests
datasets.manual_action: Drop representative EO stills / short clips here at the inference stage (docs/NEXT_STEPS.md step 2).
datasets.notes: Intentionally empty. Do NOT place proprietary Honeywell / Shield AI / Hivemind footage in this Git repository.

split_derivation.method: Every file_name was extracted from all three RefDrone_*_mdetr.json files and counted. Re-derived from the released files for this task rather than trusting earlier notes.
split_derivation.mapping: RefDrone train -> VisDrone2019-DET-train; val -> val; test -> test-dev. Each RefDrone split is a strict subset of the corresponding VisDrone split (6,407<=6,471; 534<=548; 1,595<=1,610). test-challenge is not referenced.
split_derivation.mapping_status: VERIFIED. The three archives were extracted (6,471 + 548 + 1,610 = 8,629 images indexed) and all 8,536 RefDrone-referenced basenames resolved against them with 0 missing. test-challenge was never downloaded and is confirmed unnecessary.
